menuItems.name: Truffle Butter Scallops
menuItems.description: Pan-seared Hokkaido giant scallops with black truffle emulsion, sunchoke puree, and crisp sage.

menuItems.name: Heirloom Burrata Artisanal
menuItems.description: Smoked creamy burrata over heirloom tomato carpaccio, copper balsamic pearls, and garden micro-basil.

menuItems.name: Peachy Prosciutto & Truffle Pizza
menuItems.description: Smoked mozzarella, white peach slices, prosciutto di Parma, wild arugula, and a luxurious drizzle of white truffle honey.

menuItems.name: Imperial 24K Wagyu Burger
menuItems.description: A6 grade Japanese Wagyu beef patty, molten gruyere, white truffle aioli, and caramelized onions wrapped in edible 24K gold leaf.

menuItems.name: Rosemary Glazed Lamb Chops
menuItems.description: Charcoal grill-kissed Australian lamb chops coated in dynamic rosemary, garlic, and copper pomegranate reduction.

menuItems.name: Saffron Imperial Lamb Korma
menuItems.description: Slow-braised tender premium lamb shoulder infused with hand-picked saffron, cardamom essences, crushed almonds, and slow-churned organic ghee.

menuItems.name: Velvet Butter Chicken Makhani
menuItems.description: Charcoal roasted spiced chicken tikka pieces simmered in silk-smooth cashew-tomato gravy with gourmet house butter.

menuItems.name: Truffle Wild Mushroom Linguine
menuItems.description: House-crafted bronze-cut linguine tossed with morel mushrooms, fresh black truffles, Parmigiano-Reggiano cream, and soft chives.

menuItems.name: Saffron Butter Salmon Tail
menuItems.description: Wild Scottish salmon fillet pan-roasted skin-crisp, served over asparagus spears and coated in heavy saffron-chive butter.

menuItems.name: Golden Velvet Lava Soufflé
menuItems.description: 72% Madagascar chocolate warm soufflé with a molten interior, raspberry reduction, and gold dust dusting.

menuItems.name: Saffron Pistachio Brûlée
menuItems.description: Creamy vanilla bean custard infused with saffron threads, topped with hardened sugar glass and roasted Sicilian pistachios.

menuItems.name: Hibiscus Saffron Copper Sparkler
menuItems.description: Sparkling natural spring hydration combined with cold-extracted hibiscus flowers, luxury saffron syrup, and elderflower mist.

reviews.comment: Absolutely stellar. The sunchoke puree pairs phenomenally with the seared scallops! World-class fine dining indeed.
Imperial Lamb Korma is incredibly rich and authentic. Tender meat fell right off the bone with cardamom warmth. Simply stunning.

blogs.title: The Crafting of A6 Japanese Wagyu at Velvet Fork
blogs.excerpt: Deep dive into the sourcing, marbling indices, and premium char-searing techniques behind our world-famous burger.
blogs.content: Inside the kitchens of Velvet Fork, Japanese Wagyu is treated as a sacred medium of art. Raised in pristine mountains in Miyazaki prefecture, our beef contains marble scores reaching grade twelve. Cooking this beef requires intense pan-searing on artisanal pink Himalayan salt stones, locking in pristine monounsaturated fats. Brushed with aged white truffle butter and carefully plated inside 24-carat gourmet gold leaf, our Imperial Wagyu Burger transcends the definition of modern burgers. Pair it with an ancient vintage bordeaux to cut through the exquisite rich fat profile for an unforgettable dinner.
blogs.author: Executive Chef Jean-Luc

blogs.title: Elevating cardamoms and saffrons in Fine Dining
blogs.excerpt: Unpacking the rich historic culinary pathways of Imperial Mogul and Pakistani cooking styles redefined for luxury layouts.
blogs.content: Pakistani traditional cooking has always carried the depth of aromatic spices. In recreating the Imperial Lamb Korma, our kitchen team set out to marry standard fine-dining reduction techniques with braising methods dating back to the grand Royal Mughlai courts. Hand-ground almonds form a velvety butter paste, emulsified with double-strained warm ghee. Kashmiri saffron threads are lightly toasted to activate volatile esters before being submerged in high-hydration cream. The result is a gorgeous golden gravy with smooth mouthfeel and balanced cardamom finishes. It represents the very DNA of what Velvet Fork stands for: respecting the old while pioneering the sublime.
blogs.author: Chef Tariq Mehmood
